steps.title: Track the layered obstacles
steps.content: The passage says long-distance transport has improved, but last-mile logistics remain a bottleneck. Consumer time pressure, roadway congestion, and complications from proposed innovations all continue to constrain delivery.

steps.title: Infer the near-term result
steps.content: B shifts to raising expectations, C recommends an investment strategy not discussed, and D overstates drones as currently able to meet expectations. The persistent obstacles support the conclusion that companies are unlikely to overcome last-mile impediments soon. The answer is A.
